title: helianthemum oelandicum subsp. oelandicum
intro: Helianthemum oelandicum subsp. oelandicum, also known as the Öland heath, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which can help to protect against oxidative stress and improve cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves.
